scripts.prepare: npm install --prefix ../auth-activity-feeds/functions && npm install --prefix ../auth-chat/functions && npm install --prefix ../firestore-activity-feeds/functions
scripts.test: npm run test-auth && npm run test-token-generation && npm run test-firestore
scripts.test-token-generation: npx -y firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --project demo-stream --log-verbosity SILENT 'npx jest token-generation.test.ts --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --forceExit'
scripts.test-auth: npx -y firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --project demo-stream --log-verbosity SILENT 'npx jest auth.test.ts --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --forceExit'
scripts.test-firestore: sh -c 'cp "extensions/firestore-activity-feeds.env.local" "../firestore-activity-feeds/functions/.env.local" && cp "extensions/firestore-activity-feeds.secret.local" "../firestore-activity-feeds/functions/.secret.local" && npx -y firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --project demo-stream --config firebase.firestore.json --log-verbosity SILENT "npx jest firestore.test.ts --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --forceExit"; rc=$?; rm -f "../firestore-activity-feeds/functions/.env.local" "../firestore-activity-feeds/functions/.secret.local"; exit $rc'
